questions.question: Do vaccines cause food allergies in children?
questions.rationale: This directly addresses a specific vaccine misinformation claim that influences parent vaccination decisions
questions.misinformation_narrative: Many parents believe vaccines trigger food allergies in their children, leading some to delay or refuse vaccinations
questions.public_stakes: Vaccine hesitancy based on this false belief puts children at risk of preventable diseases while providing no protection against food allergies

questions.question: Are IgG food sensitivity tests reliable for diagnosing food allergies?
questions.rationale: Addresses widespread commercial misinformation about unvalidated food sensitivity testing
questions.misinformation_narrative: Commercial IgG testing is widely marketed to consumers as a way to identify food sensitivities and allergies, despite lack of scientific validity
questions.public_stakes: People waste money on unreliable tests and may unnecessarily restrict diets or miss real food allergies that require medical attention

questions.question: Do COVID-19 vaccines cause blood clots?
questions.rationale: Addresses specific safety concern that has significantly impacted vaccine uptake
questions.misinformation_narrative: Fear of blood clots from COVID vaccines has led to widespread vaccine hesitancy, despite the much higher clotting risk from COVID infection itself
questions.public_stakes: Vaccine hesitancy based on exaggerated clotting fears puts people at much higher risk from COVID infection
